resources.string: We often recommend a variety of different types of themes, hope you can find the theme you like in %s ！
We’re always adding new movies and TV show to %s. Keep track of everything you want to watch by adding them to your list!

External storage is not permitted to read, please open first

Bluetooth is not permitted to record, please open first
External storage is not permitted to write, please open first
A new version is available. Upgrade to the new version?
MOD APK of APP may contain viruses or steal your data. Please delete current app immediately and copy the following link to the browser to download the official APK

"The original device will receive a pop-up. Click 'Allow' to complete authorization."
Connection Failed — The receiver should tap Receive.
Not enough storage. Transfer cancelled. Please free up space.
Both %1$s and %2$s method can log in to the same account and WhatsApp method is recommended
. If you sign up with SMS, SMS fees may apply.
Your code was sent to your WhatsApp + %1$s %2$s.
Invalid CPF format. Please enter 11 digits without special characters.

May contain explicit drug use, violence, and sexual innuendo.
Restricted to ages 18 and over, contains graphic violence, sexual content, or nudity.

"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."

"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."

%1$s is a free streaming platform with over 100,000 movies&shows. It gathers video from all major platforms such as Netflix, ZEE5, Disney+, Sony, Amazon, and more. The emphasis here is on being free, completely free. Click the link below to download:%2$s

This is a premium exclusive channel. After subscribing to premium, you can watch for free.
Your behavior is abnormal and the system has locked your account.
Log in to follow TV channels
Deleting your account is a permanent operation

"1.Deleting your account from %1$s will remove all data (Including but not limited to such as: Premium, Gold coins, Cash balance, My Watchlist, My Thematic Collection, etc.) related to this account and can't be undone. "
2.After deleting your account, you will get a new account even if you log in with the same number or email address again.
3.Deleting your account and registering again will not get any new account rewards.
4.Please double check that you really want to delete this account.
Your account was logged in from %1$s. If this was not your action, please change your password immediately.
By Logining ,you agree to AppName’s Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
LOGIN To Get Premium for free

When this option is selected, users who log out will retain their login information for quick access next time without needing OTP. If unselected, users who log out will need to receive an OTP to log in again.

You can buy a Premium Code from the agent and then use it to activate the Premium in the App (‘Activate with Premium Code’).

Need to fill in the movie name to submit
Network lag detected. Try switching networks.
Sorry for your confusion, There are two possible reasons why payment failed:
There are two ways to activate our Premium Plan:

"Sorry for your confusion, due to financial reasons, we use many payment accounts at the same time. Some accounts may fail to receive payment, so we often change the payment account. As long as the payment account is shown from the App to the browser, it is safe, don't worry."

Premium Code is a key that can be used to activate our App’s Premium Plan. Each Premium Code represents a Premium Plan (such as: 1 month plan, 3 month plan), and each Premium Code can only be used once. We allow Agents to sell Premium Code to users. When you buy Premium Code from Agent, you should tell the Agent what kind of Premium Code you want to buy (1 month, 3 months, 6 months, 12 months), and ask the price, then pay to Agent. After receiving the money, Agent will send you a Premium Code, and then you can copy the Premium Code to paste it in the App (‘Activate with Premium Code’) to use it.
Go to [ME] and click the [Settings] button in the upper right corner, then select the [Contact Us] option from the [SUPPORT & ABOUT] Menu.
Click on [Order History] in the upper right corner of the current page. You will find [Contact Us], click on it to reach us.
1. Please check whether your account has been restricted by the bank.
2. Due to the reasons of our payment account is restricted by the bank, as a result, sometimes users always fail to pay, for which we are very sorry.
When your payment always fails, we recommend that you buy a Premium Code from our Premium Code Agent, which is the fastest and 100% successful way to activate Premium Plan.
But please contact the agent from Premium Code Agent list in our App, and do not trust anyone who claim to be our agent outside our app to avoid being deceived.
Why does the payment account change every time when I create an order?
Why do my payments always fail?
Premium not activated after payment successful, what to do?
How to contact the customer support team?
In most cases, Premium will be automatically activated within 2 hours after successful payment. There are a few cases, due to bank reasons, the payment may be delayed for several hours or even days.

If you have paid successfully, but Premium has not been automatically activated after 2 hours, please click [Order History] in the top right corner, find your order, and use the ‘Feedback’ button to report Admin.

"If you cannot upload pictures in the App, please contact customer service and provide UserID (one click copy from the button at the top of this page), payment successful full screenshot (must contain: Amount, Payment time, UTR number, Otherwise, we can't confirm your payment order and can't help you solve the problem). The validity period of Premium will be calculated from the time of activation and will not be reduced due to waiting for confirmation."
%1$s has launched a perfectly adapted APK application for smart TVs. You can click here to view the download and installation tutorial.
How can I watch %1$s App movies on my SmartTV?
Sorry for your confusion, these orders are actually created whenever you attempt to make a payment, only orders that show a successful payment are deducted.
Why are there so many orders in my order history, is money being deducted from these orders?
Nick must be 1-26 characters and cannot contain special characters.
This nickname is already taken. Please try another one.
You have no enough Gold coins to exchange the Premium plan. Please complete the task to %s
No, my payment did not go through.

(Non-subscribers are allowed to download %s videos per day)
Ads skipped during your premium: %s times.
The number of Premium Exclusives was %s.
"Number of devices that can be logged in"
Location Services required for Bluetooth scanning.
Plz transfer exact payment as mentioned here for Premium Plan

"In most cases, Premium will be automatically activated within 30 minutes after successful payment. There are a few cases, due to bank reasons, the payment may be delayed for several hours or even days. If you have paid successfully, but Premium has not been automatically activated after 30 minutes, please contact customer service and provide UserID (one click copy from the button at the top of this page), payment successful full screenshot (must contain: Amount, Payment time, Account details, Otherwise, we can't confirm your payment order and can't help you solve the problem). The validity period of Premium will be calculated from the time of activation and will not be reduced due to waiting for confirmation."

" Warning: your transfer payment amount must be exactly the same as the Premium Plan amount, otherwise it may affect the automatic activation of Premium （ For example, 1-Month Plan 299Rs, you must transfer to pay 299Rs, and you can‘t transfer to pay 300Rs)."

"After enabling Parental Control, adult content will be hidden. Disabling it will make the content visible again. Note: Don't forget your 4-digit password. If lost, it cannot be recovered, and Team %1$s cannot assist with recovery."
Ages 10+ – May contain violence and coarse language.
Only L/10-rated content available at this rating.
Ages 14+ – May contain moderate violence, explicit drug use, and sexual innuendo.
Only L/10/14-rated content available at this rating.
Ages 16+ – May contain explicit drug use, violence, and sexual innuendo.
Only L/10/14/16-rated content available at this rating.
Adults Only: Restricted to ages 18 and over, contains graphic violence, sexual content, or nudity.
All ratings available at this rating.
Only L-rated content available at this rating.
All Ages: Suitable for all ages, may contain mild comedic violence or language.
Only G-rated content available at this rating.
Adults Only: Restricted to ages 18 and over, contains graphic violence, sexual content, or nudity.
All ratings available at this rating.
Parental Guidance: Recommended for children under 12 with an adult, contains some violence, sexual content, or language.
Parents Strongly Cautioned: Under 13 requires a parent, contains intense violence, sexual content, or coarse language.
Only G/PG/PG-13-rated content available at this rating.
Only G/PG-rated content available at this rating.
Restricted: Under 17 requires an accompanying adult, contains strong violence, sexual content, or mature themes.
Only G/PG/PG-13/R-rated content available at this rating.

Your Premium Subscription is expiring in %1$s days. Renew it before expire, after %2$s days you will not get this Big Discount. Early renewal will not clear your remaining premium days.
Your Premium Subscription is expiring in %1$s day. Renew it before expire, after %2$s day you will not get this Big Discount. Early renewal will not clear your remaining premium days.
Please remember your parental control PIN.
You choosed the %1$s renew plan,After renew your %2$s valid till %3$s
Please select the type of report
This video is restricted by parental controls. Please disable them to watch.

"1.Make sure your Android phone and the screen casting device (such as a smart TV or projector) are connected to the same Wi-Fi network. 2.Your Smart TV or projector needs to support Google Cast. 3.If you still cannot cast your screen after meeting the above conditions, please try again later"
"If I can't find my devices, are there any other methods for screen casting?"

"Method 1： Using Google Cast (Chromecast): If your casting device supports Google Cast (like Chromecast), install the Google Home app on your Android phone. Open the app, select the device you want to cast to, and start the screen mirroring function. This will display your phone screen's content on the casting device.
Method 2： Using Miracast or Wi-Fi Direct: Some Android phones and casting devices support Miracast or Wi-Fi Direct. In your phone's settings menu, look for options like Display, Screen mirroring, or similar, and select the device you want to cast to. Then, enable the screen mirroring function, and your phone screen's content will appear on the casting device.
Method 3： Using third-party apps: There are also third-party apps available on the market that offer screen mirroring capabilities, such as AirDroid, ApowerMirror, Screen Stream Mirroring, etc. These apps typically provide screen mirroring features, allowing you to mirror your Android phone screen to other devices. Search and install the appropriate app from the Google Play Store, and follow their instructions for setup and usage.
Specific steps may vary based on your phone model, OS version, and casting device. Refer to your phone's manual or seek help on support forums for accurate instructions."
This ads does not support click to open

"Step 1: Log in to Your Account If you haven't logged in yet, please click the 'Log in to purchase' button at the top of this page to log in.
Step 2: Choose a Premium Plan Choose a Premium plan - We offer Premium plans for 1 month, 3 months, 6 months, and 12 months. All Premium plans are currently on discount, and the longer you subscribe, the greater the discount you'll enjoy!
Step 3: Do payment Click the 'PAY NOW' button at the bottom of this page, choose your preferred payment method, complete payment according to instructions.%1$s
Step 4: Premium activation After successful payment, Premium will be automatically activated immediately or within 2 hours."

"In most cases, Premium will be automatically activated within 30 minutes after successful payment. There are a few cases, due to bank reasons, the payment may be delayed for several hours or even days. If you have paid successfully, but Premium has not been automatically activated after 30 minutes, please contact customer service and provide UserID (one click copy from the button at the top of this page), payment successful screenshot (must contain: Amount, Payment time, UTR number, Otherwise, we can't confirm your payment order and can't help you solve the problem). The validity period of Premium will be calculated from the time of activation and will not be reduced due to waiting for confirmation."
Premium not activated after payment successful, what to do?

"Method 1: Go to [ME] and click the [Settings] button in the upper right corner, then select the [Contact Us] option from the [SUPPORT & ABOUT] Menu.
Method 2: Click on [Order History] in the upper right corner of the current page. You will find [Contact Us], click on it to reach us."
How to contact the customer support team？
%1$s has launched a perfectly adapted APK application for smart TVs. You can %2$s to view the download and installation tutorial.
How can I watch %1$s App movies on my SmartTV?
Upgrade your premium can watch videos in advance
Your premium will activate within 2 hours. If not activated after 2 hours, click %1$s in the top right corner, find your order, and use the feedback button to report Admin.

If your problem is very urgent, you can
